author: m.ikhtiyar
title: app got broken
content: The app got broken after the last two updates. It keeps crashing, and the offline cloud folder doesn’t work anymore. It also shows LRC files and the app’s data files as songs in the library.

author: rudiekekli
title: LOVE IT!
content:
Hello there, i just wanted to say that i ABSOLUTELY LOVE this app!!
it is so comfortable to use and you can do what you want: creat a playlist, change name of the song…
just design it however YOU want
this is the only good app for listening to music offline
pls do not delete this app🙏🏼❤️
